tests.description: ATDD E2E tests for ConnectShyft UI availability and capability messaging (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given ConnectShyft feature flags are disabled, when users access ConnectShyft UI surfaces, then the UI fails closed with controlled unavailable messaging.
Given only selected sub-flags are enabled, when users access ConnectShyft UI capabilities, then only enabled capabilities are exposed with explicit messaging for disabled capabilities.

summary: Generated 3 FAILING E2E tests for Story a.1 ConnectShyft availability guardrails
